title: Fairy Wings Elytra
description: Fly high with this fluttering opalescent fairy wings elytra reskin! 💖🧚
body:
![Fairy Wings Elytra Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7113131fbd6e7069bf0bd300245e3b7de505559.png)

---
Make your elytra flights a little more magical with this fairy-themed pastel elytra!  
Inspired by typical pixie-like wings, the design is meant to invoke a translucent wing like you might see on a dragonfly with a more magical, opalescent glowing effect.  

![Fairy Wings Elytra Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VznX8ddb/images/7a2dbd27a1c586eb87b2391d1186e12a9680ef93.png)

Looking for more fairy-themed resource packs? Check out the [Garden Gals Fairy-Core Collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/tRl3fJJM)!
